_note: Produced by the ccc-research skill from candidates.json (coverage) + web discovery. Discovery items with inferred dates/lineups carry needs_confirm:true — verify before publishing (accuracy = trust).
weather_summary: Hot and humid start (low 90s, sunny), with scattered PM thunderstorms mid-week. Saturday is the wildcard — great if it holds, so have an indoor backup. Classic Iowa July: hydrate, sunscreen, and don't trust the radar past noon.
editor_note: Peak summer week — the calendars are thin and repetitive, but the town is not. The real action is free and outdoors: BBQ and a blues band in North Liberty, live music in the parks, two farmers markets. Lead with those. And start beating the drum for the Johnson County Fair, two weeks out.

deep_dive.why: It's the biggest family thing of the summer, admission is mostly free, and busy parents want the insider version: which days/hours are free, where the free parking is, the barrel train and chicken toss and Bill Riley Talent Show, and when to go with little kids vs. older ones.
deep_dive.needs: Confirm 2026 daily schedule + the $2 paid window (Sat-Mon 8pm) from thejohnsoncountyfair.com/fair-schedule; scout best hours for under-5s.

events.title: North Liberty Blues & BBQ
events.hook: Live music, real barbecue, and enough open grass to let the kids run — the free summer Saturday North Liberty does best. (Confirm date/time before print.)

events.title: Summer of the Arts: Music on the Move
events.hook: Free live music in a park, 6:30-8, early enough for a bedtime save. Pack a blanket and a picnic. (Confirm which park this week.)

events.title: North Liberty Concert Series (Ranshaw House porch)
events.hook: Friday-night porch concert, free and low-key — the kind of thing you didn't know you needed until you're there. (Confirm act + time.)

events.title: Iowa City Farmers Market
events.hook: Saturday-morning ritual: kolaches, a dollar for the kid to spend on their own, and you're home before the heat. (Confirm hours.)

events.title: Coralville Farmers Market
events.hook: Wednesday-evening market with live music down at the Landing — dinner-by-food-truck and a lap of the shops. (Confirm hours.)

events.title: Art Play Sundays
events.hook: Open-ended, messy art with zero cleanup for you — the good kind of tired-out, and a solid Sunday rain plan.

events.title: ICM at the Museum (drop-in play)
events.hook: Your reliable A/C fallback all week (member hours run early most mornings — see the standing-events page).
